sections.title: Ammo
body: Each turn when a weapon with 3+ inches of range makes a attack: after resolving the attack roll 1 D6 on a 3+ the weapon has passed the ammo check, on a 1 or a 2 place a ammunition marker next to them to simbolise that they have ran out of ammunition.

sections.title: Cover
body: When a model is obscured or has a piece of terran blocking the sights of the attacker then that unit is considered in cover, while in cover the following benefits take action:
-1 to be hit
+1 to save dice

sections.title: Cells
body: At the start of each players turn that player gains 1 cell (this can be altered by abilities) The player can have up to a maximum of 5 cell points, once 5 has been reached the player must remove 1 STM from each unit under there control. To a minimum of 0

sections.title: Strains
body: The following will be abilites that are universal strains for units to use, each strain will specify how much Cells are needed to use it
Reroll- 1 cell
Cover fire- 2 cells
Chill- 1 cell
Burn- 1 cell

sections.title: Reroll
body: Reroll -1 cell
At the start of your turn you may use this
Roll 1 D3, that number is the number of dice you may reroll this turn.

sections.title: Cover fire
body: Cover fire -2 cells
When your opponent moves a enemy within 12 inches of a friendly model.

That friendly model may make a normal move. After that model has made a normal move you may select another model that also withing 12 inches and has line of sight of the enemy model, that model may shoot at the enemy model if they are an elegible target.

sections.title: Chill
body: Chill -1 cell
When a friendly unit would be destroyed you may use this (excluding Vehicles)
All there remaining STM is lost and there remaining wounds is changed to 1

sections.title: Burn
body: Burn -1 cell
When a friendly unit would be destroyed you may use this (excluding Vehicles)
Before the model is removed it may make 2 STM actions (not of the same action) before dying.
